episodes.title: The Psychology of Cults: How Ordinary People Are Recruited and Controlled
episodes.description:
In this video Dr Kelly Watkins breaks down the psychology of cults, exploring how they recruit, control, and why anyone can be vulnerable. Learn about the psychological tactics used and how awareness is the key to protection.

Key takeaways

Cults target human needs, not just weak individuals.
Gradual commitment and isolation are key control tactics.
Leaving a cult is complex, akin to overcoming addiction.
Awareness of psychological tactics is the best protection.

Chapters

00:00 Understanding Cults: The Ordinary People Behind Them
02:24 The Recruitment Process: How Cults Attract Members
04:57 Psychological Control: Tactics Used by Cults
08:02 The Struggle to Leave: Why People Stay in Cults

DISCLAIMER:
This video is designed for educational purposes and does not replace advice or treatment from a mental health professional. If you’re struggling with your mental health, please seek appropriate support in your country. In the UK, I recommend:

Your GP
Emergency services
Mind (Mental Health Charity)
Samaritans (Call 116 123)
You are not alone, and help is always available. 💙
